case_title: LAMHA, CARMEN vs. INTELLIGENT ELECTRONICS, INC.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAMHA, CARMEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INTELLIGENT ELECTRONICS, INC. $4,915.88 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,995.88
